title: Estimating No-CoT Task-Completion Time Horizons of Frontier AI Models
summary: Estimating No-CoT Task-Completion Time Horizons of Frontier AI Models
whyItMatters: (see full author list at the end) About a year ago, METR showed  that the length of tasks frontier models can reliably complete doubles every few months. A related safety-relevant question is this: what length of tasks can models complete without any chain of thought (CoT)? We investigate in our new paper .
